class Account extends AccountBase with AccountMixin<Account> {

  static const PREFIX = 'account';

  static const COL_CLIENT_ID = 'account_client_id';
  static const COL_LABEL = 'account_label';

  static const COL_CURRENCY_CODE = 'account_currency_code';
  static const COL_DATA = 'account_data';
  static const COL_CREATED_AT = 'account_created_at';
  static const COL_UPDATED_AT = 'account_updated_at';
  static const COL_VALID = 'account_valid';
  

  Account([Map<String, dynamic> initialData = const {}])
      : super(
      initialData: initialData,
      name: ENTITY_NAME,
      prefix: PREFIX,
      columns: COLUMNS);

  @override
  Account get self {
    return this;
  }

  @override
  String singlePKValue() {
    return 'id';
  }

  List<String> identifierColumns() {
    return [

      COL_ID,
    ];
  }
  @override
  Account fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) {
    return Account(json);
  }

  set id(String|num|null v) { doSet(COL_ID, v, String|null); }
  String|null getID() { return id; }

  set label(String v) { doSet(COL_LABEL, v, String); }
  String getLabel() { return label; }
  Account setLabel(String v) { label = v; return this; }

  set balance(String|num|num v) { doSet(COL_BALANCE, v, String); }
  String getBalance() { return balance; }
  Account setBalance(String|num|num v) { balance = v; return this; }

  set currency_code(String v) { doSet(COL_CURRENCY_CODE, v, String); }

  Account setCurrencyCode(String v) { currency_code = v; return this; }

  set data(Map<String, dynamic> v) { doSet(COL_DATA, v, Map<String, dynamic>); }

  Account setData(Map<String, dynamic> v) { data = v; return this; }

  set created_at(String|num v) { doSet(COL_CREATED_AT, v, String); }

  Account setCreatedAT(String|num v) { created_at = v; return this; }
